fund_name: SBI US Specific Equity Active FoF Fund
info_10_about: Investment objective of SBI US Specific Equity Active FoF Fund The scheme seeks to provide long term capital appreciation by investing in units of one or more mutual fund schemes / ETF, which are domiciled overseas and predominantly invest in US markets.
info_12_how_to_invest: 1. Download the INDmoney app. 2. Search for the fund. 3. Choose SIP or lump sum. 4. Enter the investment amount. 5. Complete payment using bank mandate or UPI.
info_14_fund_vs_competition:
